## Before Any Entry — Verify These 5 Rules

| Check | Tool |
|---|---|
| Price > 50-day MA | TradingView / broker chart |
| S&P 500 > 200-day MA | SPY daily chart |
| No earnings within 3 days | Earnings Whispers / finviz.com |
| RSI 14 < 70 | TradingView |
| No major negative news today | Pre-market news scan |
